description_long: This shotgun features a tactical, modern design with a matte black finish and a robust, angular frame. It is equipped with a drum magazine beneath the receiver, suggesting high ammunition capacity. The stock is skeletonized and adjustable, providing ergonomic support and reduced weight, while the fore-end is fitted with a rail system for accessory attachment. The barrel is relatively short and thick, with visible venting along the top, likely for heat dissipation. The trigger guard is large and rounded, allowing for gloved use, and the overall build appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components.
description: A tactical, matte black shotgun with a drum magazine, skeletonized adjustable stock, and vented barrel, built for high capacity and durability.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle, drum magazine profile, and the alignment of the barrel and stock.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the full length, drum magazine, skeletonized stock, and accessory rail along the barrel.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stock's structure, the back of the receiver, and the symmetry of the shotgun.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 1, with clear visibility of the trigger guard and magazine.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with vented ribbing along the top
attribute_trigger_guard_design: Large, rounded trigger guard with a smooth contour and ample space for gloved fingers
